title: Sara: 'Race you, Eva!' — scooter grab
prompt: Mid-wide shot at @playground-park — soft mulch transitioning to paved sidewalk, soft warm afternoon light. @Sara already CENTER-LEFT standing on the sidewalk with both feet planted, ponytail with bow, both hands gripping the handlebars of @pink-scooter beside her, beaming with cheerful kid energy. Sara has exactly two arms and two hands visible — both on the scooter handlebars. The pink scooter stays parked beside Sara, both her hands gripping it at handlebar height. @Eva already CENTER-RIGHT standing on the sidewalk right next to Sara with both feet planted, curly blonde hair with rainbow bow, both hands gripping the handlebars of @teal-scooter beside her, beaming with cheerful kid energy. Eva has exactly two arms and two hands visible — both on the scooter handlebars. The teal scooter stays parked beside Eva, both her hands gripping it at handlebar height. (BEAT 1 — 0-5s) Sara turns her head softly toward Eva with a cheerful determined kid-grin, both hands still on her scooter handlebars. Sara (cheerful sing-song kid-voice): "Hop on the scooter, sister! Let's ZOOM to the court!" (BEAT 2 — 5-10s) Eva turns her head softly toward Sara with an excited delighted grin, both hands still on her scooter handlebars. Eva (cheerful giggle, hands still on handlebars): "Last one there is a silly-fish, sister!" Both girls stay grounded with both feet on the sidewalk, both hands still on their respective scooters. Calm cheerful warm kid-show ambiance throughout. STRICT ANATOMY: Sara has exactly two arms and two hands at all times — both gripping pink scooter handlebars. Eva has exactly two arms and two hands at all times — both gripping teal scooter handlebars. Both girls stay grounded with both feet on the sidewalk throughout — no leaping, no jumping, no kicking off the scooter to ride yet (clip ends with both girls stationary on the sidewalk).
